mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_resume_id.nextval FROM dual
INSERT INTO tbl_resume (resume_id, fk_memberid, fk_category_id, fk_region_code, title, address, self_intro, desired_salary, photo_path, write_status, is_primary, allow_scout, uploaded_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{memberid}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{regionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{selfIntro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{desiredSalary, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{photoPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{writeStatus}, #{isPrimary}, #{allowScout}, SYSDATE, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_resume SET title = #{title}, fk_category_id = #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, fk_region_code = #{regionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, self_intro = #{selfIntro, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, desired_salary = #{desiredSalary, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, photo_path = #{photoPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, write_status = #{writeStatus}, is_primary = #{isPrimary}, allow_scout = #{allowScout}, uploaded_at = SYSDATE WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} AND fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tbl_resume SET is_deleted = 1, is_primary = 0, allow_scout = 0 WHERE resume_id = #{resumeId} AND fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT R.resume_id AS resumeId, R.fk_memberid AS memberid, R.fk_category_id AS categoryId, R.fk_region_code AS regionCode, R.title, R.address, R.self_intro AS selfIntro, R.desired_salary AS desiredSalary, R.photo_path AS photoPath, R.write_status AS writeStatus, R.is_primary AS isPrimary, R.allow_scout AS allowScout, TO_CHAR(R.uploaded_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS uploadedAt, R.is_deleted AS isDeleted, M.name AS memberName, M.email AS memberEmail, M.phone AS memberPhone, TO_CHAR(M.birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS memberBirthDate, M.gender AS memberGender, JC.category_name AS categoryName, RG.region_name AS regionName FROM tbl_resume R JOIN tbl_member M ON R.fk_memberid = M.memberid LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON R.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region RG ON R.fk_region_code = RG.region_code WHERE R.resume_id = #{resumeId} AND R.is_deleted = 0

SELECT R.resume_id AS resumeId, R.fk_memberid AS memberid, R.fk_category_id AS categoryId, R.fk_region_code AS regionCode, R.title, R.self_intro AS selfIntro, R.write_status AS writeStatus, R.is_primary AS isPrimary, R.allow_scout AS allowScout, R.photo_path AS photoPath, TO_CHAR(R.uploaded_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS uploadedAt, JC.category_name AS categoryName, RG.region_name AS regionName, (SELECT schoolname || ' ' || NVL(major, '') FROM (SELECT E.schoolname, E.major FROM tbl_resume_education E WHERE E.fk_resume_id = R.resume_id ORDER BY E.sort) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS educationSummary, (SELECT MIN(companyname) || CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 1 THEN ' (' || TO_CHAR(COUNT(*)) || '건)' ELSE '' END FROM tbl_resume_career WHERE fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS careerSummary, (SELECT LISTAGG(S.skill_name, ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY S.skill_name) FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_skill S ON RT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS techSummary, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resume_certificate WHERE fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS certificateCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resume_portfolio WHERE fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS portfolioCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resume_language WHERE fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS languageCount, (SELECT FLOOR(SUM(MONTHS_BETWEEN(NVL(C.leavedate, SYSDATE), C.joindate))) FROM tbl_resume_career C WHERE C.fk_resume_id = R.resume_id) AS careerMonths, (SELECT category_name FROM (SELECT JC2.category_name FROM tbl_resume_career C2 JOIN tbl_job_category JC2 ON C2.fk_category_id = JC2.category_id WHERE C2.fk_resume_id = R.resume_id AND C2.fk_category_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY C2.sort) WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS careerCategoryName, (SELECT EL.edu_level_name FROM (SELECT E2.fk_edu_level_code FROM tbl_resume_education E2 WHERE E2.fk_resume_id = R.resume_id ORDER BY E2.sort) JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON fk_edu_level_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE ROWNUM = 1) AS educationLevelName FROM tbl_resume R LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON R.fk_category_id = JC.category_id LEFT JOIN tbl_region RG ON R.fk_region_code = RG.region_code WHERE R.fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND R.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY R.is_primary DESC, R.uploaded_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tbl_resume SET is_primary = 0, allow_scout = 0 WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tbl_resume WHERE fk_memberid = #{memberid} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT name AS "name", email AS "email", phone AS "phone", TO_CHAR(birth_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "birthDate", gender AS "gender" FROM tbl_member WHERE memberid = #{memberid}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_education (education_id, fk_resume_id, schoolname, major, fk_edu_level_code, enrolldate, graduationdate, status, sort) VALUES (seq_resume_education_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{schoolname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{major, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{educationLevelCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{enrolldate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{graduationdate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort})
mapper.select: SELECT E.education_id AS educationId, E.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, E.schoolname, E.major, E.fk_edu_level_code AS educationLevelCode, TO_CHAR(E.enrolldate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS enrolldate, TO_CHAR(E.graduationdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS graduationdate, E.status, E.sort, EL.edu_level_name AS educationLevelName FROM tbl_resume_education E LEFT JOIN tbl_education_level EL ON E.fk_edu_level_code = EL.edu_level_code WHERE E.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY E.sort ASC, E.enrolldate DESC NULLS LAST
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_career (career_id, fk_resume_id, companyname, fk_category_id, jobname_custom, position, joindate, leavedate, job_desc, sort) VALUES (seq_resume_career_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{companyname}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{jobnameCustom, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{joindate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{leavedate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{jobDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sort})
mapper.select: SELECT C.career_id AS careerId, C.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, C.companyname, C.fk_category_id AS categoryId, C.jobname_custom AS jobnameCustom, C.position, TO_CHAR(C.joindate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS joindate, TO_CHAR(C.leavedate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS leavedate, C.job_desc AS jobDesc, C.sort, JC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume_career C LEFT JOIN tbl_job_category JC ON C.fk_category_id = JC.category_id WHERE C.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY C.sort ASC, C.joindate DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_language (language_id, fk_resume_id, language_name, testname, score, acquired_date) VALUES (seq_resume_language_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{languageName}, #{testname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{score, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{acquiredDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.select: SELECT language_id AS languageId, fk_resume_id AS resumeId, language_name AS languageName, testname, score, TO_CHAR(acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS acquiredDate FROM tbl_resume_language WHERE fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY acquired_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_certificate (cert_id, fk_resume_id, fk_certificate_code, acquired_date) VALUES (seq_resume_certificate_cert_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{certificateCode}, TO_DATE(#{acquiredDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.select: SELECT RC.cert_id AS certId, RC.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, RC.fk_certificate_code AS certificateCode, TO_CHAR(RC.acquired_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS acquiredDate, C.certificate_name AS certificateName, C.issuer FROM tbl_resume_certificate RC JOIN tbl_certificate C ON RC.fk_certificate_code = C.certificate_code WHERE RC.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY RC.acquired_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_portfolio (portfolio_id, fk_resume_id, portfolio_type, link, filepath, original_filename, created_at) VALUES (seq_resume_portfolio_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{portfolioType}, #{link, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{filepath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{originalFilename, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT portfolio_id AS portfolioId, fk_resume_id AS resumeId, portfolio_type AS portfolioType, link, filepath, original_filename AS originalFilename, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS createdAt FROM tbl_resume_portfolio WHERE fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_award (award_id, fk_resume_id, award_name, organization_name, award_date, description) VALUES (seq_resume_award_id.nextval, #{resumeId}, #{awardName}, #{organizationName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_DATE(#{awardDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT award_id AS awardId, fk_resume_id AS resumeId, award_name AS awardName, organization_name AS organizationName, TO_CHAR(award_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS awardDate, description FROM tbl_resume_award WHERE fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY award_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_resume_techstack (fk_resume_id, fk_skill_id, proficiency) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{skillId}, #{proficiency, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT RT.fk_resume_id AS resumeId, RT.fk_skill_id AS skillId, RT.proficiency, S.skill_name AS skillName, SC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_resume_techstack RT JOIN tbl_skill S ON RT.fk_skill_id = S.skill_id LEFT JOIN tbl_skill_category SC ON S.fk_skill_category_id = SC.skill_category_id WHERE RT.fk_resume_id = #{resumeId} ORDER BY SC.skill_category_id ASC, S.skill_name ASC

SELECT certificate_code AS certificateCode, certificate_name AS certificateName, issuer FROM tbl_certificate WHERE UPPER(certificate_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ORDER BY certificate_name ASC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT category_id AS categoryId, fk_parent_id AS parentId, category_name AS categoryName, depth FROM tbl_job_category ORDER BY category_id ASC
SELECT region_code AS regionCode, fk_parent_region_code AS parentRegionCode, region_name AS regionName, region_level AS regionLevel, sort FROM tbl_region ORDER BY sort ASC, region_name ASC

SELECT S.skill_id AS skillId, S.skill_name AS skillName, SC.category_name AS categoryName FROM tbl_skill S LEFT JOIN tbl_skill_category SC ON S.fk_skill_category_id = SC.skill_category_id WHERE UPPER(S.skill_name) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' ORDER BY S.skill_name ASC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
